input: Patient with a 4-week productive cough and mild left-side pleuritic pain. Afebrile. Exam unremarkable. Want to rule out early infiltrate. Please get a chest X-ray within 48 hours and call the office with results.
response: Reminder: please get your chest X-ray within 48 hours as your doctor requested. Call the office with results. Important — don't delay this one!
